summary: A Clash of Clans-style strategy game with base-building, resource management, building placement, troop training, and attack mechanics
architectural_notes: Strategy game with real-time base defense and attack gameplay
imageRequirements:
## Required Images
- Gold coin icon with shiny metallic appearance (gold-icon.dim_64x64.png)
- Purple elixir droplet icon with glossy effect (elixir-icon.dim_64x64.png)
- Medieval town hall building illustration with stone walls and red roof (townhall-icon.dim_128x128.png)
- Gold mine building with pickaxe and ore cart (goldmine-icon.dim_128x128.png)
- Purple elixir collector building with magical crystal (elixir-collector-icon.dim_128x128.png)
- Wooden barracks building with training yard (barracks-icon.dim_128x128.png)
- Stone cannon defense tower (cannon-icon.dim_128x128.png)
- Wooden archer tower with archer on top (archer-tower-icon.dim_128x128.png)
- Barbarian warrior portrait with helmet and sword (barbarian-portrait.dim_96x96.png)
- Archer portrait with bow and arrows (archer-portrait.dim_96x96.png)
- Giant warrior portrait with club (giant-portrait.dim_96x96.png)
- Construction hammer icon for building upgrades (construction-icon.dim_64x64.png)
- Victory star icon for battle results (star-icon.dim_64x64.png)

existing_features.title: Create a 3D isometric game world using Three.js with React Three Fiber where players can view and interact with their base from a top-down perspective
Implement a resource management system tracking Gold and Elixir with visual counters in the UI header
Create a building placement system allowing players to place, move, and upgrade buildings on a grid-based map
Implement core building types: Town Hall, Gold Mine, Elixir Collector, Gold Storage, Elixir Storage, Barracks, and defensive structures (Cannon, Archer Tower, Walls)
Create a building upgrade system with time-based construction and resource costs
Create an attack mode where players can deploy troops on an enemy base and watch them autonomously attack buildings and defenses
Design a visually cohesive fantasy medieval game theme with vibrant colors, stone and wood textures for buildings, and grass terrain, creating an engaging strategy game aesthetic
Render generated game assets including building icons, troop portraits, and resource icons as static assets in frontend/public/assets/generated

new_feature_requests.summary: Implement a troop training system in Barracks allowing players to queue and train different unit types (Barbarian, Archer, Giant)
Implement combat mechanics with troop stats (HP, damage, movement speed, attack range) and targeting logic
Create a matchmaking system that pairs players with similar-level bases for attacking
Implement a reward system for successful attacks that awards Gold and Elixir based on destruction percentage
